name: John Legend
abstract: John Roger Stephens (born December 28, 1978), known professionally as John Legend, is an American singer, songwriter, pianist and record producer. He began his musical career working behind the scenes for other artists, playing piano on Lauryn Hill's "Everything Is Everything", and performing as an uncredited backing vocalist on Jay-Z's …

about_quotes.speaker: Nancy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: I’m not just a fan. I’m – I got a crush on John Legend. ... I saw him at the – I don’t know what it is – the Oscars or the Grammys
about_quotes.doc_title: Nancy Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: We just sent him a record with John Legend tomorrow, A Better You, Better Me, which we did before. John Legend did it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
